title: fix(deps): update module github.com/sirupsen/logrus to v1.9.4
body:

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>sirupsen/logrus (github.com/sirupsen/logrus)</summary>

### [`v1.9.4`](https://redirect.github.com/sirupsen/logrus/releases/tag/v1.9.4)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/sirupsen/logrus/compare/v1.9.3...v1.9.4)

#### Notable changes

- go.mod: update minimum supported go version to v1.17 [#​1460](https://redirect.github.com/sirupsen/logrus/pull/1460)
- go.mod: bump up dependencies  [#​1460](https://redirect.github.com/sirupsen/logrus/pull/1460)
- Touch-up godoc and add "doc" links.
- README: fix links, grammar, and update examples.
- Add GNU/Hurd support [#​1364](https://redirect.github.com/sirupsen/logrus/pull/1364)
- Add WASI wasip1 support [#​1388](https://redirect.github.com/sirupsen/logrus/pull/1388)
- Remove uses of deprecated `ioutil` package [#​1472](https://redirect.github.com/sirupsen/logrus/pull/1472)
- CI: update actions and golangci-lint [#​1459](https://redirect.github.com/sirupsen/logrus/pull/1459)
- CI: remove appveyor, add macOS  [#​1460](https://redirect.github.com/sirupsen/logrus/pull/1460)

**Full Changelog**: <https://github.com/sirupsen/logrus/compare/v1.9.3...v1.9.4>

</details>
